caption:
"ATHLETE OF THE WEEK: Cleo Lorenzo🔥 
Senior Cleo Lorenzo has been voted Athlete of the Week! 🔥 She helped lead UIC Volleyball to the Chicago Cup title with standout performances, posting 15 kills and 9 digs against DePaul and 14 kills and 13 digs in a five-set win over Loyola. She is one of the teams biggest offensive leaders and key contributors defensively 🔥🔥 

 #ChicagosCollegeTeam".

She is one of the teams biggest offensive leaders and key contributors defensively 🔥🔥

caption:
"ATHLETE OF THE WEEK: Beatrice Carulli🔥 
Senior Beatrice Carulli has been voted Athlete of the Week! Beatrice started in all 6 matches and proved to be a force at the net, leading her team with 55 kills. Her consistency, leadership, and energy helped drive UIC through a busy week of competition. 🔥

 #ChicagosCollegeTeam".
